name: Arctic Wolf Networks, Inc.
h1: Arctic Wolf Networks's GCC footprint in India
lede: Arctic Wolf Networks runs three centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Noida, covering R&D, GCC/GIC and IT, built over two years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Arctic Wolf Networks office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Arctic Wolf Networks GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Arctic Wolf Networks runs 3 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Noida), covering R&D, GCC/GIC and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Arctic Wolf Networks's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Noida, spanning R&D, GCC/GIC and IT. The centers deliver IT for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all eleven decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: Arctic Wolf Networks operates 3 active centers in India.

faq.a: Arctic Wolf Networks's India footprint includes Bengaluru and 1 additional cities.

faq.a: Arctic Wolf Networks runs R&D and 2 additional center types centers in India.
